name: Buyer DB Re-engagement email #1 (mass email)
body:
Hi %contact_first_name%,

This is %agent_name% with Dunlap Real Estate.. We recently upgraded your home search portal to make it even easier to find listings that match what you’re looking for.

Here’s your updated search link: %custom_ylopo_listing_alert%

Take a look and let me know if the homes you’re seeing still fit your goals — or if I should adjust your search criteria!

Happy shopping!
subject: Home Search Update for %contact_name% – Dunlap Real Estate
